landing.heroSubtitle: Upload photos and audio from your technical inspection and receive a professional budget with findings, estimated costs, and a PDF ready to send to your client.
landing.heroNote: No credit card required · 10 free reports · Cancel anytime
landing.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to turn a technical inspection into a professional budget.
landing.step1Desc: Capture images and record your voice during the technical inspection directly from your phone or computer.
landing.step2Desc: Automatic transcription with Whisper and multimodal analysis with NVIDIA Gemma to detect findings and severity.
landing.step3Desc: Get a professional PDF with findings, estimated costs, executive summary, and recommended actions.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools to turn your technical inspections into professional budgets effortlessly.
landing.featMultimodalDesc: Simultaneous analysis of images and audio with state-of-the-art models to detect technical issues accurately.
landing.featCostsDesc: The AI calculates costs per finding, generating subtotals, taxes, and totals in your organization's currency.
landing.featPdfDesc: Generate budgets in PDF with your company data, client info, logo, and a clean, professional format.
landing.featChatDesc: Modify the budget by chatting with the AI via text or voice. Change severities, costs, and descriptions instantly.
landing.featLangDesc: Full support in Spanish, English, and Portuguese. The AI responds, transcribes, and generates PDFs in your chosen language.
landing.featSecurityDesc: Each organization has its isolated space with JWT authentication, role control, and Row-Level Security in the database.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free and scale according to your team's needs. No surprises, no lock-in contracts.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the companies already using OmniReport AI to generate professional budgets in minutes, not hours.
